title: Redesign 'Get in Touch' CTA section on Home page to match uploaded screenshot

requirements.text: Redesign the 'Get in Touch' / CTA section on the Home page (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx) to exactly match the uploaded screenshot (image-2.png): solid golden yellow (#f5c518) full-width background, large bold dark navy (#0a1628) heading 'Ready to Start Your Business Journey?' using the same Poppins/Inter font as the rest of the site, a subtitle in dark navy 'Get expert guidance today — 100% free consultation, no obligations', three horizontally-arranged CTA buttons: (1) 'Get Free Consultation' with a phone icon on dark navy (#0a1628) background with white text, (2) 'Call: +91 8102906339 / 9279242122' with a phone icon on dark navy (#0a1628) background with white text — where the call button links to tel:9279242122, (3) 'WhatsApp Us' with a WhatsApp/message icon on green (#22c55e) background with white text linking to https://wa.me/918102906339 opening in a new tab, and three trust badge lines below the buttons: '✓ No registration fee', '✓ Expert advice', '✓ Response within 30 minutes' in dark navy text. All text, fonts, and button styles must be consistent with the rest of the site (Poppins/Inter font family). The section must be fully responsive — buttons stack vertically on mobile screens < 640px. Do not alter any other section on the Home page.

quotes: Ready to Start Your Business Journey?
Get expert guidance today — 100% free consultation, no obligations
✓ No registration fee    ✓ Expert advice    ✓ Response within 30 minutes
Get in touch section ko upper maine jaisa screenshot diya h waisa likhe and same font and same colour ke saath

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Get in Touch' / CTA section on the Home page has a solid golden yellow (#f5c518) background across its full width.
The heading 'Ready to Start Your Business Journey?' is displayed in bold dark navy (#0a1628) using the same Poppins/Inter font family as the rest of the site, matching the screenshot style.
The subtitle 'Get expert guidance today — 100% free consultation, no obligations' is displayed in dark navy below the heading.

Three CTA buttons are visible side-by-side on desktop: 'Get Free Consultation' (dark navy background, white text, phone icon), 'Call: +91 8102906339 / 9279242122' (dark navy background, white text, phone icon linking to tel:9279242122), and 'WhatsApp Us' (green #22c55e background, white text, WhatsApp icon linking to https://wa.me/918102906339 in a new tab).
Three trust badges are displayed below the buttons: '✓ No registration fee', '✓ Expert advice', '✓ Response within 30 minutes' in dark navy text.
On mobile screens (< 640px), the three buttons stack vertically.
No other section on the Home page is modified.
Font family matches the global Inter/Poppins configuration with no overrides.

constraints: Use only the existing global font family (Inter/Poppins) — do not introduce any new typeface.
Do not modify any other section on the Home page.
Do not change the dark navy (#0a1628) background of the rest of the site — this change is isolated to the CTA section which has a golden yellow background.
Do not edit any immutable frontend paths.
nonGoals: Changing any other page or component besides the Home page CTA section.
Adding new backend endpoints or data models.
Modifying the hero section, services preview, stats section, or strengths section on the Home page.
Changing the global color theme or font configuration.
